news_results.title: LeBron James joins Kobe Bryant as second player to make 1,000 3-pointers with Lakers, starts hot in win over Warriors - Yahoo Sports
news_results.description: LeBron James made his first four 3-point attempts Saturday night in a 129-101 road win over the Golden State Warriors (31-29), and, along the way, he became the second player to make 1,000 3-pointers with the Los Angeles Lakers (35-24).
